hooks.command: bash -c 'cmd=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"command\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null || echo ""); echo "$cmd" | grep -qE "(rm -rf /|DROP TABLE|cat (\.env|\./.env|/.*\.env)|git add (\.env|.*\.env))" && echo "BLOCKED: Dangerous command detected" && exit 1 || exit 0'

bash -c 'file=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"path\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null || echo ""); [ -n "$file" ] && [ -f "$file" ] && grep -qE "(PRIVATE_KEY|SECRET|PASSPHRASE)\s*=\s*[a-fA-F0-9]{20,}" "$file" 2>/dev/null && echo "BLOCKED: Hardcoded secret detected in $file" && exit 1 || exit 0'
